chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1117 of 2012 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions For hearing of CMA No.2879/2015 (C/A) 31.01.2024 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for petitioners/applicants. Mr. Kareem Bux Janwri, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Saif Ali Qureshi, District Education Officer (Literacy), Sukkur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsel for petitioner has filed a statement along with Photostat copy of letter dated 17.01.2024 and Minutes of Meeting. We have heard the parties. This petition was disposed of on 26.11.2014 in terms whereby petitioners were to move an application for their regularization, to be considered by the relevant quarters in accordance with law. The grievance of the petitioners is that their application was not considered, which fact has been disputed by learned AAG. In any case, vide order dated 16.03.2023, this Court had directed Secretary Schools and Literacy Department to form a committee to look into the issue of petitioners. Learned AAG undertakes that the grievance of the petitioners would be resolved in light of recommendations of the committee within two months, in accordance with law. Accordingly, this contempt application is disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
